user_story: As a System admin, I want to create or edit the head office organization with its name, type, industry and location, so that the company profile is accurately defined
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Head Office screen; When I enter Name, Organization type, Industry type and Location name and click Save; Then the organization record is saved

user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the financial year start, payroll period and payroll occurrence, so that payroll runs on the correct schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing the head office; When I set Financial year starts from, Payroll period and Payroll to occur and save; Then the payroll settings are stored

user_story: As a System admin, I want to configure whether the payroll date shifts when it falls on a holiday or weekoff, so that payroll is not scheduled on non-working days
acceptance_criteria: Given the payroll configuration question is shown; When I answer whether to change the payroll date on holiday/weekoffs and save; Then the preference is applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to capture the registered address and contact details, so that official company communications use correct information
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing the head office; When I fill Address, City, Country, State, Pin code, Phone, Fax and Email and save; Then the address and contact details are stored

user_story: As a System admin, I want to upload the login and home logos, so that the application is branded with the company identity
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing the head office; When I browse and upload the Login Logo (220x40) and Home Logo (151x47) and save; Then the logos are applied to the application

user_story: As a System admin, I want to add and manage organization documents with effective dates, so that compliance documents like PAN, TAN and ESI are tracked
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the head office documents section; When I click Add new document and set document type and effective dates; Then the document is saved and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete organization setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have entered head office details; When I click Save & Next; Then the record is saved and the next setup screen opens
